name: An UPDATE message with status PARTIALLY_PAID before CREATE
description: Test sending an UPDATE operation message with different statuses via GPD message API before a CREATE
descriptionHtml: Test sending an UPDATE operation message with different statuses via GPD message API before a CREATE
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Expected 422 for UPDATE before CREATE with status PARTIALLY_PAID, got 500. Response: {
  "timestamp" : "2026-03-24T07:01:52.163+00:00",
  "path" : "/gpd/message",
  "status" : 500,
  "error" : "Internal Server Error",
  "requestId" : "40417ab9-1330933"
}

labels.name: story
labels.value: Consumer sends RTP message to Sender with different statuses
